---
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
scrolling: true
editor: visual
theme: lumen
---

## Columns {width= "35%"}

placeholder text for column 1

```{r, loadpackages}
#| echo: false
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)
library(scales)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)
```

```{r, printstarwars}
head(starwars)
```

## Columns {width= "65%"}

placeholder text for column 2

### Rows {height="10%"}

placeholder text for row 1

### Rows {height="70%"}

placeholder text for row 2

### Rows {height="20%"}

placeholder text for row 3
